prompt:
Create a high-end commercial skincare poster for a premium hand cream. Use the uploaded portrait photo only for appearance and hairstyle so the final result can achieve a similar identity using only that portrait. Preserve only face shape, facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportion, and overall temperament. Do not reference the original portrait's expression, clothing, background, lighting, or pose. All other visual content must follow the current poster prompt. Show an elegant young woman in refined modern brand styling, softly applying a pearl-sized amount of hand cream to the back of one hand while holding a sleek ivory hand cream tube with a subtle silver cap in the foreground. The product must be visually central, sharp, readable as hand cream, with a smooth cream texture visible on the skin. Premium minimalist skincare campaign atmosphere, warm clean studio background with soft cream, blush, and ivory tones, natural hydrated skin texture, delicate hand pose, luxury editorial beauty photography, shallow depth of field, soft diffused key light, gentle rim light, polished but realistic skin, clean composition for a social media poster. Add elegant poster typography with the headline “SILKEN TOUCH” and subtitle “Daily repair hand cream for soft, luminous hands”, placed with generous spacing and refined modern serif typography. No watermark.

Negative Prompt:
watermark, random text, misspelled headline, garbled letters, logo distortion, low quality, blurry, plastic skin, extra fingers, deformed hands, bad anatomy, overexposed highlights, unrealistic lighting, oversmoothed skin, cheap e-commerce look, AI-generated look, distorted hand cream tube, warped packaging, unreadable product label, messy cream texture, unnatural hand pose, stiff facial expression, crowded composition
